355 J1400_LIFE_PRGNS_CD J1400_LIFE_PRGNS_CD J1400 Life Prognosis Less Than Six Months Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has a condition or chronic disease that may result in a life expectancy of less than six months. -=Not assessed/no information

356 J1550A_FVR_CD J1550A_FVR_CD J1550A Problem Conditions: Fever Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a fever.
